## ✨ Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🤔 Problem & Motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it valuable? -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered alternative approaches or workarounds? -->

## 📋 Implementation Scope

<!-- If you have ideas about implementation, describe them here. -->

- [ ] Backend changes needed?
- [ ] Frontend changes needed?
- [ ] New API endpoints?
- [ ] New dependencies?
- [ ] Database migration needed?

## 📸 Mockups / References

<!-- If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or links to similar features in other projects. -->

## 📎 Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
